title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the value on sliders, Save EQ
scenario: Custom EQ slider values fail to save when creating a new preset in Device Settings > EQ
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
6. Adjust one or more slider values (e.g., Bass, Mid, Treble) to desired levels.
7. Tap the 'Save EQ' button to save the custom preset.
expected: The custom EQ preset is saved successfully and appears in the list of available EQ presets.
